title: OPG Completes Shaft Excavation Works At Darlington BWRX-300 SMR Project
text:
Three shafts reach full depth to support reactor construction and cooling systems
            Excavation work has been completed on shafts at the Darlington BWRX-300 small modular reactor project in Canada in support of the construction of the site’s first unit, owner Ontario Power Generation (OPG) said.
